job.title: Talend Expert
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: As an Expert Talend, you are the technical reference for our Data practice in Marseille. You design complex ETL/ELT architectures and support the teams in upskilling.
mission.2: Develop and optimise complex Talend jobs
mission.4: Provide technical guidance to BI developers
mission.5: Participate in architecture and pre-sales phases
mission.6: Ensure data pipeline migration and modernisation
mission.7: Monitor technological developments in the Data ecosystem
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in computer science
profile.2: 4 to 8 years of experience with Talend
profile.3: ETL/ELT expert with advanced proficiency in Talend Data Integration
profile.4: Knowledge of architectures Big Data (Spark, Hadoop) is a plus
profile.5: Ability to mentor and share knowledge
